Q: How to Invest in HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth?
A: You can easily invest in HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps: Log on to your Groww account Search for HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth from the search box In order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless and take a few minutes to complete Once you are done with that, you can start investing in HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your investment objective and risk tolerance

content:
Q: What is the PE and PB ratio of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth?
A: The PE ratio ratio of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is determined by dividing the market price by its earnings per share and the PB ratio of the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value per share (BVPS).
